suite.name: CT US5 03 - IncreaseQuantity AddSameProduct

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: CT_US5_03 - IncreaseQuantity AddSameProduct

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Étape 1: Vérifier que la page d'accueil s'affiche correctement
kw.arg: Étape 1: Vérifier que la page d'accueil s'affiche correctement
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//ul[contains(@class,'categoriesMenu') or contains(@class,'nav') or contains(@id,'nav')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//ul[contains(@class,'categoriesMenu') or contains(@class,'nav') or contains(@id,'nav')]' but did not.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Étape 2: Précondition - ajouter 1 produit puis vérifier la page Shopping Cart
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Add One Product To Cart From Home
kw.doc: Adds product at index 2 from the Popular Items section. Returns the product name and the URL of the product page.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To Shopping Cart Full Page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Cart Row Quantity For Product
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Verify No Product Duplicates In Cart
kw.doc: Asserts that no product name appears more than once as a separate line in the cart.

kw.name: Verify Cart Row Total Price
kw.doc: Checks that at least one numeric price is visible on the page.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Étape 3: Naviguer vers la fiche du même produit
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Étape 4: Saisir la quantité ${EXTRA_QTY} dans le champ quantité
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Value
kw.doc: Returns the value attribute of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Icône panier mise à jour, quantité affichée: ${badge_qty}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Verify No Product Duplicates In Cart
kw.doc: Asserts that no product name appears more than once as a separate line in the cart.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Aucun doublon dans le panier flottant.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log

kw.arg: Aucune ligne vide détectée dans le panier.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Vérifier que l'ajout du même produit depuis sa fiche met à jour la quantité dans le panier (cumulée, max 10) sans créer de doublon.
test.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//ul[contains(@class,'categoriesMenu') or contains(@class,'nav') or contains(@id,'nav')]' but did not.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: CT_US5_03 - Augmentation de quantité en ajoutant le même produit au panier
